title: ellisiophyllum pinnatum subsp. bhutanense
intro: Ellisiophyllum pinnatum subsp. bhutanense is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Ellisiophyllum pinnatum plant, which is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ellisiophyllum pinnatum subsp. bhutanense include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating digestive issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
